name: Aqusafe Filters
description: Aqusafe filters are handheld membrane filters that attach to faucets or gravity-fed bucket attachments.

taxonomy.sub_category: Aqusafe Filters Updated on December 27, 2023 · Created on September 27, 2018 Aqusafe Filters Aqusafe filters are handheld membrane filters that attach to faucets or gravity-fed bucket attachments. Developed By Aqus Tested By Florida International University SANAS Testing Laboratory Uganda Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Aqusafe filters are small membrane filters that have 2 types of adapter systems: (1) Faucet adapter used to filter running water from tap and (2) Bucket adapter for places that do not have running water. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Market Suggested Retail Price $40.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household, Community Distributors / Implementing Organizations Organizations and investors include ENVenture, UNIOM, Palau Ministry of Education, and Right Now; along with the government of Ghana, Panama, Uganda and the Vatican. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Ekofil filter , Katadyn Drip , VF 100 Village Bucket Filter , Stéfani Filtro Flex , and Arcifiltro . Regions Worldwide Manufacturing/Building Method Unknown Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model Users can buy the product online or become a partner with Aqus. Distributions to Date Status Unknown Target use case Indivudual, household or community use Manufacturer-specified flow rate (L/hr) 60 L Bacteria reduction 4 log Type of membrane filtration Ultrafiltration Virus reduction Unknown Protozoa reduction Removes protozoa (such as Giardia, Cryptosporidium, Cyclospora) Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction The Aqusafe filters do not remove heavy metals or chemicals Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) Filters have been tested under low turbidity (0.44 NTU) Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) Unknown Material of construction Plastic Safe water storage capacity (L) None Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) Unknown Design Specifications The Aqus filters comprise one filter, one adapter and one filter cleaning syringe. The Aqus filter can treat down to 0.01 micron size with bacteria removal up to log scale 6. The design and installation do not require electricity and the product has no moving parts. The following video demonstrates the functionality. The filter weighs 46.4 g. The different parts included in the bucket kit and faucet kit are available in the tech specifications. Technical Support The installation manuals of bucket filter adapter and faucet filter adapter are available. For technical assistance contact the manufacturer. Replacement Components Filter replacements are available from the manufacturer. Lifecycle 3 years. The product comes with a lifetime warranty for manufacturing defects. Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters This product was developed to simplify the water treatment process in the household setting. Vetted Performance Status Water from the Aqusafe filter was tested for filtration efficacy by Biological Consulting Services and found to remove microspheres and bacteria. The filter was also analyzed by the Uganda National Bureau of Standards and passed their seven water quality parameters. Safety It is recommended to soak the filter occasionally in a water bleach solution to prevent potential bacterial growth. Complementary Technical Systems Safe water storage container. Available: http://www.aquswater.com Compliance with regulations The products follow US-EPA and UNBS drinking water standards. They are also certified by ISO, ANSI, and CDC. Evaluation methods The water treated by the product has been evaluated for biological contamination by US and Ghana accredited laboratories. The filters went through a filtration efficacy study.
